message: ci: pin zig in web workflows

files.patch:
@@ -49,7 +49,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Setup Zig
         uses: mlugg/setup-zig@v2
         with:
-          version: latest
+          version: 0.15.2
 
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

@@ -54,7 +54,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Setup Zig
         uses: mlugg/setup-zig@v2
         with:
-          version: latest
+          version: 0.15.2
           
       - name: Install dependencies
         working-directory: ./web

       - name: Setup Zig
